sentences.target: Mon ambition est de devenir infirmière.

translations.fr: Mon ambition est de devenir infirmière.
translations.en: My ambition is to become a nurse.
translations.de: Mein Ziel ist, Krankenschwester zu werden.
translations.it: La mia ambizione è diventare infermiera.
translations.pt: Minha ambição é me tornar enfermeira.
translations.vi: Tham vọng của tôi là trở thành y tá.
translations.nl: Mijn ambitie is om verpleegkundige te worden.
translations.hi: मेरी महत्वाकांक्षा नर्स बनने की है।
translations.el: Η φιλοδοξία μου είναι να γίνω νοσηλεύτρια.
translations.nb: Målet mitt er å bli sykepleier.
translations.sv: Min ambition är att bli sjuksköterska.
translations.ro: Ambiția mea este să devin asistentă medicală.
translations.cs: Mým cílem je stát se zdravotní sestrou.
translations.da: Min ambition er at blive sygeplejerske.
translations.ja: 私の目標は看護師になることです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), used before a vowel-initial feminine noun; modifies 'ambition' to mark possession.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the infinitival complement.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement.
Verb in the infinitive; complement of 'de', expressing change of state.
Common noun, feminine; predicative complement of 'devenir' (profession).

translations.zh-Hans: 在这里我们尊重你的志向。
translations.yue: 喺呢度我哋尊重你嘅志向。
translations.he: כאן אנחנו מכבדים את השאיפות שלך.
translations.vi: Ở đây, chúng tôi tôn trọng tham vọng của bạn.
translations.hi: यहाँ हम आपकी महत्वाकांक्षा का सम्मान करते हैं।
translations.ja: ここではあなたの志を尊重します。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; generic 'we/one'.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular); transitive.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), used before a vowel-initial feminine noun; modifies 'ambition'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'respecte'.
Adverb of place; modifies the clause to indicate location.

translations.en: I admire his/her ambition at work.
translations.es: Admiro su ambición en el trabajo.
translations.de: Ich bewundere ihren Ehrgeiz bei der Arbeit.
translations.it: Ammiro la sua ambizione al lavoro.
translations.ko: 나는 그 사람의 일에서의 포부를 존경한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我欣赏他在工作中的抱负。
translations.yue: 我欣賞佢喺工作上嘅抱負。
translations.ru: Я восхищаюсь его стремлением на работе.
translations.pt: Eu admiro a ambição dele no trabalho.
translations.he: אני מעריך את השאיפה שלו בעבודה.
translations.vi: Tôi ngưỡng mộ tham vọng của anh ấy trong công việc.
translations.nl: Ik bewonder haar ambitie op het werk.
translations.uk: Я захоплююся його прагненням на роботі.
translations.hi: मैं उसके काम में महत्वाकांक्षा की प्रशंसा करता हूँ।
translations.el: Θαυμάζω τη φιλοδοξία του στη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Jeg beundrer ambisjonen hans på jobb.
translations.id: Saya mengagumi ambisinya di tempat kerja.
translations.sv: Jag beundrar hennes ambition på jobbet.
translations.da: Jeg beundrer hans ambition på arbejdet.
translations.ja: 私は彼の仕事での向上心を称賛します。

tokens.explanation: Verb, 1st person singular present; subject clitic 'je' elided to 'j'' and attached to the verb; main predicate.
Possessive determiner (3rd person singular), used before a vowel-initial feminine noun; modifies 'ambition'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'admire'.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le'; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'au'.

sentences.target: Parle-moi de ton ambition pour l'année prochaine.
sentences.reading: /paʁl mwa də tɔ̃‿ɑ̃.bi.sjɔ̃ puʁ l‿a.ne pʁɔ.ʃɛn/

translations.fr: Parle-moi de ton ambition pour l'année prochaine.
translations.ipa: /paʁl mwa də tɔ̃‿ɑ̃.bi.sjɔ̃ puʁ l‿a.ne pʁɔ.ʃɛn/
translations.en: Tell me about your ambition for next year.
translations.es: Háblame de tu ambición para el próximo año.
translations.de: Erzähl mir von deinen Zielen für nächstes Jahr.
translations.it: Parlami della tua ambizione per l'anno prossimo.
translations.ko: 내년에 대한 네 포부에 대해 말해줘.
translations.zh-Hans: 跟我说说你明年的志向。
translations.ru: Расскажи мне о твоих целях на следующий год.
translations.pt: Fale-me sobre sua ambição para o ano que vem.
translations.he: ספר לי על השאיפה שלך לשנה הבאה.
translations.vi: Hãy kể cho tôi về tham vọng của bạn cho năm tới.
translations.nl: Vertel me over jouw ambition for volgend jaar.
translations.uk: Розкажи мені про твої амбіції на наступний рік.
translations.hu: Mesélj nekem a jövő évre szóló ambíciódról.
translations.hi: अगले साल के लिए अपनी महत्वाकांक्षा के बारे में मुझे बताओ।
translations.pl: Opowiedz mi o swojej ambicji na następny rok.
translations.el: Πες μου για τη φιλοδοξία σου για την επόμενη χρονιά.
translations.nb: Fortell meg om ambisjonen din for neste år.
translations.id: Ceritakan kepada saya tentang ambisimu untuk tahun depan.
translations.sv: Berätta för mig om din ambition för nästa år.
translations.ro: Spune-mi despre ambiția ta pentru anul viitor.
translations.cs: Pověz mi o své ambici na příští rok.
translations.da: Fortæl mig om din ambition for næste år.
translations.ja: 来年の抱負について話して。

tokens.explanation: Imperative 2nd person singular of 'parler' with enclitic pronoun 'moi' (indirect object) attached by hyphen; main verb.
Preposition introducing the topic complement.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), used before a vowel-initial feminine noun; modifies 'ambition'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'de'.
Preposition marking purpose or time frame.
Common noun, feminine; head of NP with attached clitic determiner 'l''; complement of 'pour'.
Adjective, feminine singular; postnominal modifier of 'année'.
